summary: Fixed 4 bugs in artifact counter system: (1) reviser now uses next_num directly and increments counter in new Stage 8a postflight, (2) collision detection loops added to all 4 skill files, (3) disk reconciliation blocks added using find+sed to handle legacy counter drift, (4) plan_version vs artifact number confusion documented in plan-format.md and artifact-formats.md. All 4 extension core copies synced and verified byte-identical.

artifacts.summary: Execution summary covering all 4 phases: skill-reviser fixes, planner/researcher/team-research reconciliation+collision detection, documentation updates, and extension core sync
